candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue label; matches total revenue concept exactly.
Not revenue; this is COGS, so not appropriate for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of sales
candidates.why: Cost component, not revenue.
Revenue-related but clearly a small component/other income item, not total company revenue.
Explicit sales/top-line label; identical values to Total Revenue, likely primary sales line.
COGS subcomponent, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list. 'Net sales' is the most specific top-line sales label; 'Total Revenue' is a valid fallback and appears identical in the preview.

candidates.why: Direct match for cost of goods sold / cost of sales.
Subcomponent of cost of sales, not preferred over the full direct COGS line.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of sales
candidates.why: Only a depreciation/amortization component within COGS, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the full direct COGS line and excluded subcomponents.

candidates.why: Core SG&A component representing selling overhead.
Subcomponent/balancing-style detail and less complete than the main selling expenses line.
Core SG&A component representing administrative overhead.
Subcomponent detail; less preferred than the main administrative expenses line.
Additional overhead bucket that is operating in nature and not clearly COGS/D&A/interest/tax.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the main overhead component rows and excluded balancing lines, 'other' subcomponents where a main row exists, and D&A-related rows.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; strong direct match.
Same concept with different capitalization; likely used in some periods as an alternate reported line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization supplemental item, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Accumulated Amortization of Research and Development
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset gross amount, not expense.

variables.notes: Using the explicit R&D expense labels as a priority list to capture label variation across years.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense; appears to be the main reported interest expense line.
Interest-related but narrower lease-specific component, not preferred over the main interest expense line.
Finance-cost fallback if explicit interest expense is missing in some periods.
Very generic and likely incomplete/unused; weak fallback only.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; less preferred than the main statement line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Using a priority list for interest expense. Main reported interest expense first, then lease-interest, then broader finance-cost fallback.

candidates.why: Equity total, but includes non-controlling interests and is therefore less preferred for BE when parent equity is available separately.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Chose outside the candidate list because the candidate list misses the semantically correct owner-equity line. Per the equity rule, BE should exclude non-controlling interests when a parent-equity line exists; 'Total Equity' would risk double counting with MIB. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Company

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not preferred over balance sheet for MIB.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Direct balance sheet minority interest synonym; valid alternate label.
Income statement attribution total, not preferred over balance sheet for MIB.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list. This complements BE selected as parent-only equity and avoids double counting.
